generated_comment: Bro, whenever any woman in office starts snapping in meetings, first thought is bas hormones ka scene hoga 😄 Otherwise such overreaction makes no sense. Arre joke hai, don't take it seriously.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it dismisses women's anger or disagreement as caused by hormones rather than treating it as valid. It encodes the frame through 'hormones ka scene' and the 'joke hai' defense to make the bias seem harmless.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
